steps.description: Click the “Source Control” icon (third item with the branch symbol and "M3" badge) in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code interface to open the Source Control view.
Click the "Close" (X) button on the "Walkthrough: Setup VS Code" tab in the Visual Studio Code application interface.
Click the "Build a Declarative Agent" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit panel on the Visual Studio Code welcome screen.
Click the "Create a New Agent/App" button in the "MICROSOFT 365 AGENTS TOOLKIT" sidebar within Visual Studio Code to start the app development workflow.
